title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 528.080 - Those having an interest may appear and be made parties
text:
528.080.  Those having an interest may appear and be made parties. — Any person having an interest in such premises, whether the same be present or future, vested or contingent, though not made a party in the petition, may appear and be made a party on application for that purpose, accompanied by an affidavit of such interest.
(RSMo 1939 § 1716) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 1552; 1919 § 2000; 1909 § 2564
